seo.title: Law Firm Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your law office. Route upset clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Law Offices
hero.subheading: Cases are sensitive. ReviewFlo helps you ask for feedback that respects confidentiality and bar rules.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Law Office Faces

items.heading: Losses feel personal
items.body: Emotional clients post heat, not facts.

items.heading: Ethics rules limit marketing language
items.body: Boilerplate review scripts do not fit.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Law Firms

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask about service, not outcomes
items.body: Templates can focus on communication and clarity.

items.heading: Private first for fee or strategy disputes
items.body: Hard conversations stay privileged-friendly when you respond directly.

items.heading: Solo and small partnerships
items.body: Simple setup without a marketing department.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can lawyers ethically ask for Google reviews?
items.a: Rules vary by jurisdiction. Keep asks truthful and avoid promising results.
Private feedback gives clients a first step before public venting.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing model sized for small practices.
Google still matters for people searching cold.
One firm link works until you need separate tracking.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Law Office Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
